title: Dahlstedtia peckoltii
taxonomy: Dahlstedtia peckoltii is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. This plant is part of the genus Dahlstedtia, which is a group of evergreen vines native to Central and South America. The genus Dahlstedtia is closely related to the genus Plumeria and is often found in tropical forests. Further classification of Dahlstedtia peckoltii at the family level is within the order Gentianales, which includes a wide range of flowering plants. The specific classification of Dahlstedtia peckoltii is subject to ongoing research and updates in botanical taxonomy.

This plant has been traditionally used in medicine, particularly in the treatment of various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, due to its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties.
